title:
Lesson 1:
Bon Appétit
description: 'Buen provecho' = Bon appétit / Enjoy your meal. Used before or during a meal, or when you see someone eating. A polite response is '¡Gracias!' or 'Igualmente' (same to you).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: La comida está lista. ¡Buen provecho a todos!
dialogue.english: The food is ready. Enjoy your meal, everyone!

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: We're eating. Enjoy — would you like some?
